title: Tealight Candle
summary: Tealight candles are small, compact candles typically housed in a metal or plastic cup. They are known for their practical size and versatility, making them ideal for creating a cozy ambiance in homes, spas, or outdoor settings. With a burn time of around 3-5 hours, tealights are perfect for short-term use, such as during dinner parties, romantic evenings, or decorative displays. They come in various colors and scents, offering options to match any mood or theme.
